imutj4lne.embedCode:
<script>
    // Inject the animated equalizer icon everywhere it's needed
    const eqTpl = document.getElementById("eqTemplate").content;
    document.querySelectorAll(".eq-icon").forEach(slot => {
      slot.appendChild(eqTpl.cloneNode(true));
    });

    /* ---------- Popup player logic ---------- */
    const overlay = document.getElementById("overlay");
    const pBody   = document.getElementById("pBody");
    const pTitle  = document.getElementById("pTitle");
    const pSub    = document.getElementById("pSubtitle");
    const pClose  = document.getElementById("pClose");
    let activeBtn = null;

    function openPlayer(btn) {
      const { type, src, title, subtitle } = btn.dataset;
      pTitle.textContent = title || "";
      pSub.textContent = subtitle || "";
      pBody.innerHTML = "";
      pBody.classList.toggle("audio-mode", type === "audio");

      const media = document.createElement(type === "video" ? "video" : "audio");
      media.src = src;
      media.controls = true;
      media.autoplay = true;
      media.playsInline = true;
      pBody.appendChild(media);

      // reflect playback state on the card button icon
      activeBtn = btn;
      media.addEventListener("play",  () => btn.classList.add("is-playing"));
      media.addEventListener("pause", () => btn.classList.remove("is-playing"));
      media.addEventListener("ended", () => btn.classList.remove("is-playing"));

      overlay.classList.add("open");
      overlay.setAttribute("aria-hidden", "false");
      // attempt autoplay (browsers may need muted for video autoplay)
      const tryPlay = media.play();
      if (tryPlay && tryPlay.catch) {
        tryPlay.catch(() => { if (type === "video") { media.muted = true; media.play().catch(()=>{}); } });
      }
    }

    function closePlayer() {
      const media = pBody.querySelector("video, audio");
      if (media) { media.pause(); media.removeAttribute("src"); media.load && media.load(); }
      pBody.innerHTML = "";
      overlay.classList.remove("open");
      overlay.setAttribute("aria-hidden", "true");
      if (activeBtn) { activeBtn.classList.remove("is-playing"); activeBtn = null; }
    }

    document.querySelectorAll(".listen-btn").forEach(btn => {
      btn.addEventListener("click", () => openPlayer(btn));
    });
    pClose.addEventListener("click", closePlayer);
    overlay.addEventListener("click", e => { if (e.target === overlay) closePlayer(); });
    document.addEventListener("keydown", e => { if (e.key === "Escape" && overlay.classList.contains("open")) closePlayer(); });

    /* ---------- Mobile slider dots ---------- */
    const cards = document.getElementById("cards");
    const dotsWrap = document.getElementById("dots");
    const slides = Array.from(cards.children);

    slides.forEach((_, i) => {
      const d = document.createElement("button");
      d.setAttribute("aria-label", "Слайд " + (i + 1));
      d.addEventListener("click", () => {
        slides[i].scrollIntoView({ behavior: "smooth", inline: "center", block: "nearest" });
      });
      dotsWrap.appendChild(d);
    });

    function updateDots() {
      const center = cards.scrollLeft + cards.clientWidth / 2;
      let idx = 0, best = Infinity;
      slides.forEach((s, i) => {
        const sc = s.offsetLeft + s.offsetWidth / 2;
        const dist = Math.abs(sc - center);
        if (dist < best) { best = dist; idx = i; }
      });
      dotsWrap.querySelectorAll("button").forEach((b, i) => b.classList.toggle("active", i === idx));
    }
    cards.addEventListener("scroll", () => window.requestAnimationFrame(updateDots), { passive: true });
    window.addEventListener("resize", updateDots);
    updateDots();
  </script>

<style>
.card::before {
content: "";
    position: absolute;
    inset: 0;
    z-index: -1;
    background:
      linear-gradient(to bottom, rgba(20,15,10,.55) 0%, rgba(20,15,10,0) 32%),
      linear-gradient(to top, rgba(20,15,10,.65) 0%, rgba(20,15,10,0) 42%);
}

.listen-btn:hover {
transform: translateY(-1px); box-shadow: 0 10px 22px rgba(0,0,0,.22);
}

.listen-btn:active {
transform: translateY(0); background: var(--yellow-press);
}

.listen-btn:focus-visible {
outline: 3px solid rgba(29,24,19,.35); outline-offset: 2px;
}

.eq-bar:nth-child(1) {
animation-delay: -.9s;
}

.eq-bar:nth-child(2) {
animation-delay: -.5s;
}

.eq-bar:nth-child(3) {
animation-delay: -.2s;
}

.eq-bar:nth-child(4) {
animation-delay: -.7s;
}

.eq-bar:nth-child(5) {
animation-delay: -.35s;
}

@keyframes eq {
0%, 100% { transform: scaleY(.45); }
    50%      { transform: scaleY(1); }
}

@media (prefers-reduced-motion: reduce) {
.eq-bar { animation: none; transform: scaleY(.85); }
}

@media (max-width: 900px) {
.cards::-webkit-scrollbar {
display: none;
}
}

.player-close:hover {
background: #e6e2d8;
}
</style>
